headline: Vinci Buys Indian Toll Roads As Valuation And Debt Questions Persist
summary: Vinci Highways, part of ENXTPA:DG, has agreed to acquire the Safeway Concessions portfolio of Indian toll road assets. The portfolio covers nearly 700 kilometers of highway capacity under long term concession contracts in key industrial and logistics corridors. The deal expands Vinci's presence into the Indian infrastructure market, adding to its global toll road and concessions footprint. For Vinci, a global player in concessions and contracting, Indian toll roads add another large road...

headline: Dollar General Home Launch And New Leaders Put Execution In Focus
summary: Dollar General (NYSE:DG) has launched "xo Holly by Holly Williams", an exclusive multi category home collection developed with entrepreneur Holly Williams. The collection focuses on affordable home decor and is available only at Dollar General stores. The company also announced several leadership changes across supply chain, merchandising and finance, including both promotions and external hires. For investors watching Dollar General at a share price of $119.74, this product launch and...
